project.name: The Dark Candle
project.purpose: A data-driven voxel game built on Bevy with real-world SI physics, procedural planetary generation, and multi-resolution octree storage. Targets both Linux (Wayland) and Windows.

key_dependencies: bevy 0.18 — ECS game engine (Wayland + X11 on Linux)
serde 1.0 — serialization for all data structs
ron 0.8 — Rusty Object Notation for data files
noise 0.9 — procedural noise (Perlin) for terrain generation
wgpu 27.0 — headless GPU compute (atmosphere renderer, particle simulation)

entry_points: src/main.rs — CLI parsing, plugin registration, Bevy app startup
tests/simulations.rs — headless simulation test harness entry point
src/bin/worldgen.rs — standalone CLI binary: planetary generation pipeline + stats output

major_modules.name: world
major_modules.responsibility: Chunks, octree SVO, terrain generation (flat + spherical) with composable NoiseStack (FBM/ridged/selector/warp/micro-detail), continent/ocean masks, biome-terrain integration (slope/altitude-aware surface materials), depth-based geological strata & ore veins, multi-scale caves (caverns/tunnels/tubes), hydraulic erosion (droplet + grid), meshing stub (ChunkMesh/chunk_mesh_to_bevy_mesh for V2), D8 flow erosion, LOD, raycast, voxel access layer, planet config; V2 sub-module (src/world/v2/): CubeSphereCoord with ChunkDir enum + same_face_neighbor_at_lod/same_face_neighbors_at_lod_all/cross_face_neighbor_at_lod/cross_face_incoming_dir helpers, ChunkBoundaryLoops component (boundary_loop.rs), cross-LOD invalidation in chunk_manager.rs Stage 1b; stitch_mesh.rs (Phase 2+3+4): V2StitchMap + v2_stitch_update (pairwise ribbon stitches — same-face and cross-face); V2CornerStitchMap + v2_corner_stitch_update (Phase 4 — 2-triangle quad caps filling the corner gap at three-way LOD junctions); helpers clip_coarse_to_fine_extent + nearest_chain_endpoint

major_modules.name: physics
major_modules.responsibility: Five physics solvers: LBM gas (D3Q19 wind/pressure/moisture), AMR fluid (Navier-Stokes rivers), FLIP/PIC (particle rain/snow/debris), gravity/buoyancy/drag forces, collision detection. Plus atmosphere model, structural integrity, SI constants

major_modules.name: chemistry
major_modules.responsibility: Heat transfer (Fourier conduction + Stefan-Boltzmann radiation), chemical reactions (RON-defined neighbor-pair matching), state transitions (melt/boil/freeze with latent heat). Fire propagation is emergent from these systems, not a separate module

major_modules.name: lighting
major_modules.responsibility: Orbital sun mechanics, Rayleigh+Mie atmospheric scattering (CPU for export); in-game GPU sky dome (sky_dome.rs + assets/shaders/sky_dome.wgsl): custom Material with WGSL Rayleigh scattering, sun disk, reverse-Z infinity rendering (z=0.0), AlphaMode::Blend to bypass depth prepass, floating-origin anchoring in PostUpdate; moon billboards (MoonBillboard, spawn_moon_billboards, update_moon_positions) driven by Keplerian orbit via GameElapsedSeconds; sunlight propagation/light maps, volumetric cloud ray-marching, terrain shadows, cloud shadows, distance fog with time-of-day color, day/night cycle. Phase 12 Tier 2: Snell's law refraction + Fresnel equations + TIR in optics.rs; per-chunk refraction maps in refraction.rs; refractive DDA ray march in world/raycast.rs. Phase 12 Tier 3: Cauchy chromatic dispersion (dispersive_n_rgb, snell_refract_rgb, fresnel_reflectance_rgb); local Mie scattering for steam/ash (mie_local.rs); caustic Jacobian + photon beam KDE (caustics.rs)

major_modules.name: weather
major_modules.responsibility: Cloud-to-particle precipitation emission, GPU particle readback/rendering, LBM-to-GPU wind field upload, ground accumulation (snow/rain/sand deposits)

major_modules.name: gpu
major_modules.responsibility: Headless wgpu compute: atmosphere renderer (1000× speedup over CPU), particle physics compute (100k particles), terrain noise eval (93× speedup), GPU voxel generation (3-pass compute: surface/classify/voxel, 32 chunks/batch), GPU context initialization with try_new() fallback. WGSL shaders in src/gpu/shaders/

major_modules.name: data
major_modules.responsibility: RON asset loading pipeline: MaterialRegistry (sync at startup), plus lazy Bevy asset loading for enemies, creatures, items, props, trees, fluid config. Dual-indexed material lookup by ID and name

major_modules.name: simulation
major_modules.responsibility: Deterministic headless test harness: RON-defined scenarios with composable geometry regions (including CornellBox with ceiling light port), voxel_scale for sub-meter resolution, multi-tick loop (reactions → heat → transitions → pressure), assertion types for physics verification

major_modules.name: procgen
major_modules.responsibility: Procedural generation: recursive tree branching into octree, biome selection/weighted spawning, creature generation, item templates, slope-aware prop decoration, chunk spawn planning

major_modules.name: biology
major_modules.responsibility: Lifecycle (Juvenile→Adult→Elder), Kleiber's law metabolism, health with 6 damage types, corpse decomposition, vegetation spreading. Data structures complete but plugin systems not yet wired

major_modules.name: behavior
major_modules.responsibility: Utility-based AI: needs (hunger/thirst/fatigue/fear), A* pathfinding, line-of-sight/sound/smell perception, behavior execution (idle/wander/chase/eat/attack/sleep). Data structures complete but plugin systems not yet wired

major_modules.name: social
major_modules.responsibility: Factions with territory/disposition, flocking/formations, creature relationships, reputation tracking. FactionRegistry initialized but systems not yet wired

major_modules.name: persistence
major_modules.responsibility: Save/load with 3 manual slots + autosave. Persists player state (f64 WorldPosition), RLE-compressed chunks, creatures, items, enemies, factions. SaveId system for stable entity references. Version 3 with migration. On load, resets RenderOrigin to player position

major_modules.name: diagnostics
major_modules.responsibility: F3 frame budget overlay (EMA FPS/frame time), F11 ECS state dump (RON), F12 screenshot, per-system timing, video capture (ffmpeg/PNG fallback), software raymarching visualization with Perspective/Slice/TopDown views and configurable SceneLight. AgentCapturePlugin (src/diagnostics/agent_capture.rs): AI-agent rendering analysis — activate with --agent CLI flag, settles N frames then captures screenshot/video, writes meta.json, exits.

major_modules.name: camera
major_modules.responsibility: First-person camera with gravity toggle (G key). Walk 5 m/s, sprint 8 m/s, fly 20 m/s. Tangent-plane movement for spherical terrain. Spherical mode: camera orientation aligned to local surface normal via Quat::from_rotation_arc base rotation. 1.7m eye height, realistic jump physics. Uses WorldPosition(DVec3) for f64 precision; Transform is render-space only (derived from WorldPosition - RenderOrigin)

major_modules.name: floating_origin
major_modules.responsibility: Camera-relative rendering for Earth-scale planets. WorldPosition(DVec3) component holds true f64 positions. RenderOrigin(DVec3) resource defines the f32 zero point. Rebase triggers at 512m offset threshold, shifting all entity Transforms. Eliminates f32 vertex jitter at planetary distances

major_modules.name: hud
major_modules.responsibility: Health bar (gradient), temperature display (K→°C), 24-hour clock with day/night icons, 8-point compass, fall damage system (7 m/s threshold)

major_modules.name: interaction
major_modules.responsibility: DDA raycast block targeting (6-voxel reach), block break/place, 9-slot hotbar (scroll/number keys), crosshair, block outline highlight

major_modules.name: game_state
major_modules.responsibility: State machine: Loading → Playing ↔ Paused. Loading screen, pause menu with save/load slot UI, virtual time control

major_modules.name: audio
major_modules.responsibility: Material-based footstep sounds (stone/dirt/wood/sand/water), block break/place sounds, looping wind ambient, UI click

major_modules.name: entities
major_modules.responsibility: Basic enemy component and data-driven spawning framework. Minimal — serves as template for entity expansion

major_modules.name: planet
major_modules.responsibility: Standalone planetary generation pipeline: icosahedral geodesic grid, tectonic simulation with malleable plate deformation (per-cell strain field, continental rifting, plate suturing, deformation-zone orogeny), astronomical impact events, celestial mechanics (star/moons/rings/Keplerian orbits), static climate model, biome classification, geological rock/ore assignment. Used by the worldgen binary and planned for future game integration.

major_modules.name: map
major_modules.responsibility: In-game map overlay: local discovery map (biome-colored chunk columns, fog-of-war, zoom) and global planet map (equirectangular projection with player lat/lon marker, zoom/pan). Discovery tracking persisted in save files.

patterns: Data-Driven ECS: All game data loaded from .ron files via bevy_common_assets; no hardcoded stats
SI Physics: All physical properties use real-world SI units; emergent behavior only, no magic numbers
1 voxel = 1 meter spatial mapping throughout the engine
Sparse Voxel Octree (SVO): Generic OctreeNode<T> with Morton indexing for multiresolution storage
MaterialRegistry: Synchronous loading at startup with dual-indexed lookup (by ID u16 and by name String)
Async chunk management: AsyncComputeTaskPool for terrain generation and mesh building
Plugin architecture: Each module registers as a Bevy plugin with ordered system sets
Simulation test harness: Declarative RON scenarios with composable geometry and assertion framework
GPU compute via raw wgpu: Atmosphere and particle pipelines bypass Bevy's render graph
RLE compression for chunk persistence; SaveId system for stable cross-session entity references
Surface Nets meshing algorithm (smooth meshes without lookup tables)
Force-based physics: F_net = gravity + buoyancy + drag + friction; acceleration = F_net / mass
notes: LOD mesh generation: generate_mesh_generic() takes scale:f32 parameter. Non-LOD passes 1.0, LOD passes lod_step as f32. Vertex positions multiplied by scale to span full chunk extent.

features.name: Tectonic simulation

TectonicMode enum — Quick (dt=60 Myr), Normal (dt=15 Myr), Extended (dt=5 Myr)
fibonacci_sphere_points() — uniform seed placement for plate origins
weighted_bfs_flood_fill() — Pareto power-law growth weights (α=1.3, max ratio 15×)
init_plates() — physical angular velocities (2–10 cm/yr surface speed, SI rad/yr)
evolve_plate_velocities() — acceleration model with bounce at speed bounds, perturbation every ~50 Myr, slab-pull torque integration
compute_slab_pull_torques() — per-plate angular acceleration from oceanic convergent boundary cells (dominant driving force ~70%)
detect_boundaries(dt_myr) — velocity dot-product classifies Convergent/Divergent/Transform
apply_boundary_forces(dt_myr) — dt-scaled height changes per boundary type
subduction_advance(dt_myr) — dt-scaled reassignment, plates below 1% surface protected
erode(dt_myr) — double-pass dt-scaled neighbor diffusion
compute_sea_level() — area-weighted percentile targeting 30% land
features.notes: 47 unit tests. Power-law plate sizes (few large oceanic, many small continental). Geological time calibrated to real SI: velocities in rad/yr, rates in per-Myr, all dt-scaled via REF_DT_MYR=10. Three configurable modes (Quick ~50 steps, Normal ~200, Extended ~600 at default 3.0 Gyr). Force-driven motion: slab-pull torque computed from oceanic convergent boundary cells (SLAB_PULL_COEFFICIENT=2e-14 rad/yr²), normalized by plate size as inverse moment of inertia. Boundary detection now precedes velocity evolution for proper force feedback. TectonicHistory captures ≤100 snapshots (~2.5 MB/frame at level 7) for time-lapse visualization. Deformation zones use continuous geodesic-distance Gaussian falloff (sigma=600km) with Laplacian smoothing passes to eliminate discrete hop-ring banding.
features.description: 10-plate simulation with Voronoi growth, boundary detection, strain/rifting/suturing, slab-pull force feedback, forward-scatter plate advection (Rodrigues rotation, same-plate transport, trailing-edge oceanic spreading), and continuous-distance deformation zones with Gaussian falloff

TreeSkeletonHandle component
apply_wind_to_plants() — LBM pressure gradient → canopy torques
check_tree_felling() — trunk HP=0 → despawn + spawn logs
LogMarker component

features.name: Entity Bodies & Organic Physics
features.description: Articulated skeleton FK/IK, tissue compound colliders, FABRIK IK solver, locomotion gaits, player embodiment, eye/ear perception, per-region injury model (bruise→fracture→sever), plant wind response and felling. 48 lib tests pass.

features.name: Buildings & Structural Construction
features.description: Freeform building system: PartData/RecipeData RON assets, Joint stress model (axial + shear vs material strength), load-path structural analysis with progressive collapse, build-mode placement (B key, R rotate, 1m grid snap), demolition with debris, tick-based crafting with temperature gating, per-entity Inventory with weight/volume limits, BuildingPlugin wired into main. 5 construction materials extended with SI structural strengths; 8 new construction materials (oak, pine, brick, concrete, wrought_iron, bronze, clay_dried, thatch). 26 lib tests pass.

features.name: Optics Tier 2 — Refraction & Reflection
implements: snell_refract() — optics.rs (Snell's law, TIR detection)
fresnel_reflectance() — optics.rs (Fresnel equations, angle-dependent reflectance)
critical_angle() — optics.rs (n1/n2 critical angle for TIR)
dda_march_ray_refractive() — raycast.rs (DDA raymarcher bending at n-boundaries, returns RefractivePath)
ChunkRefractionMap — refraction.rs (per-chunk n-field + update system wired to LightingPlugin)
features.notes: 25+ unit tests. TIR correctly handled (bounce vs. absorb). Temperature-dependent air n included.

features.name: Optics Tier 3 — Dispersion, Local Mie, Caustics
implements: dispersive_n_rgb(base_n, cauchy_b) — optics.rs: Cauchy B/λ² per-channel n at R=680nm,G=550nm,B=440nm
snell_refract_rgb() + fresnel_reflectance_rgb() — optics.rs: 3-channel optics variants
dda_march_ray_dispersive() — raycast.rs: 3 independent channel ray traces, returns DispersivePath
mie_params_for_material() — mie_local.rs: Steam β=50,g=0.85 / Ash β=20,g=0.65
mie_phase_hg() — mie_local.rs: Henyey-Greenstein phase function
mie_transmittance_rgb() + mie_in_scatter_factor() — mie_local.rs
refraction_caustic_factor() — caustics.rs: analytical Jacobian C=(n2/n1)²×(cosθ1/cosθ2)
trace_caustic_beam() — caustics.rs: stratified photon bundle through flat interface
caustic_irradiance_at() — caustics.rs: Gaussian KDE over CausticPhoton array
MaterialData.cauchy_b: Option<f32> — serde-default field for Cauchy dispersion coefficient
MaterialData.dispersion_n_rgb() — helper returning per-channel n or None
features.notes: 35+ unit tests across new modules. glass.material.ron cauchy_b=4.61e-15 (borosilicate), quartz=3.4e-15. Scenarios: glass_prism_dispersion.simulation.ron, underwater_caustics.simulation.ron.

features.name: 3D perspective simulation video rendering
features.notes: SceneLight in VideoConfig, render_frame_lit_with_overlay() with Lambertian shading, shadow rays, Reinhard tonemapping. All 22 scenarios use Perspective view at 640x480.

features.name: Cornell box geometry & plaster materials
features.notes: CornellBox Region variant with 5 walls (floor/ceiling/back=white, left=red, right=green) + ceiling light port. Real 555mm dimensions via voxel_scale=0.0555. Material IDs: PlasterWhite=108, PlasterRed=109, PlasterGreen=110.

features.name: Emissive materials (spectral power distribution)
features.notes: EmissionSpectrum with UV/visible/near-IR/thermal-IR bands on MaterialData. Active emission (W/m²) independent of passive emissivity. Thermal coupling injects heat to neighbors. Visual rendering in all color modes. Material IDs: LedPanelWarm=111, LedPanelCool=112, IrEmitter=113.

features.name: Climate & Biome System
features.description: Insolation-based energy balance climate model: per-cell solar flux from stellar luminosity, orbital distance, axial tilt, and latitude (Berger 1978 formula). Ice-albedo feedback with iterative convergence. Meridional heat transport via Laplacian smoothing. 14 biome types from Whittaker diagram. Polar ice caps form naturally from energy distribution.

features.name: V2-aware loading gate and surface-snap spawn
features.notes: Loading screen waits for >= 9 V2 chunks (3x3 around spawn) before transitioning to Playing. V2 chunk dispatch sorted by distance to camera (closest first). snap_to_surface system on OnEnter(Playing) repositions camera to analytical terrain surface. V2ChunkMap::loaded_count() and V2PendingChunks::pending_count() public accessors added. Default spawn now finds coastline/land via find_coastline/find_random_land instead of hardcoded 45°N/0°E. Both snap_to_surface and camera_gravity clamp ground height to sea_level_radius to prevent underwater placement.

features.name: ui-camera-fix
features.description: Player Camera3d spawns with IsDefaultUiCamera to ensure Bevy UI renders to the correct camera when multiple cameras exist (e.g. shadow cameras from DirectionalLight).

features.name: terrain-gen-mismatch-fix
features.description: rebuild_terrain_gen_if_planetary now sets TerrainGeneratorRes to a PlanetaryTerrainSampler (matching SharedTerrainGen/V2TerrainGen) so spawn positioning, camera gravity, and map queries use the same elevation map as chunk generation.

features.name: global-map-zoom
features.description: Global map zoom scales the map image via absolute positioning and overflow clipping. Pan repositions the image within the viewport container. Teleport uses MapContainer bounds for coordinate mapping.

features.name: spatial_sun_lighting
features.description: Physically-correct spatial sun lighting with world-space sun direction. Day/night hemispheres emerge from DirectionalLight direction matching planet-frame sun vector. Local elevation derived from dot(sun_dir, observer_up).

features.name: gpu_voxel_generation
features.description: GPU-accelerated terrain voxel generation via WGSL compute shaders. Three-pass pipeline (surface_pass → classify_pass → voxel_pass) generates up to 32 chunks per batch. Ports full material_at_radius logic (caves, ores, strata) to GPU. Falls back to CPU AsyncComputeTaskPool when no GPU available. Gated behind noise_stack.is_some().
features.notes: Uses permutation-table-based Perlin noise matching CPU noise crate exactly (not hash-based). 32 pre-computed perm tables uploaded as GPU storage buffer. Verified: GPU and CPU produce identical terrain classification at surface chunks. 3D gradient uses noise crate's exact table (not classic Perlin shortcut). Falls back to CPU AsyncComputeTaskPool when no GPU available.

features.name: flight_altitude_hud
features.description: F3 debug overlay shows altitude above terrain surface when in flight mode (G key). Computes height as camera radius minus terrain surface radius at current lat/lon. Displays in meters (<1km) or kilometers (≥1km).

features.name: debug_render_toggles
features.description: Runtime debug toggles to aid diagnosis of terrain/atmosphere rendering. F7 toggles atmosphere rendering (removes DistanceFog/Atmosphere from player camera, disables update_fog and update_spherical_sky, sets a neutral dark-gray ClearColor). F8 toggles global wireframe rendering via bevy::pbr::wireframe::WireframeConfig.global (requires WireframePlugin and POLYGON_MODE_LINE GPU feature; desktop-only).

features.name: Procedural celestial catalogue (stars, host galaxy, nebulae, galaxies)
implements: generate_catalogue(system_seed) — generate.rs (Kroupa IMF, blackbody colour, galactic-plane bias, nebula and galaxy generation)
bake_star_cubemap(catalogue, size, mag_limit) — cubemap.rs (star-centric tangent-plane Gaussian splat with per-star kernel normalisation; f32 → f16)
splat_host_galaxy(accum, size, &HostGalaxy) — host_galaxy.rs (per-pixel disk + bulge + 3D fbm dust lanes, sampled from the normalised direction so cubemap faces share seam values)
splat_additive_nebulae / splat_dark_nebulae / splat_galaxies — diffuse.rs (anisotropic Gaussian splat; dark nebulae apply as channel-tinted multiplicative attenuators after every additive pass)
SkyPlugin — plugin.rs (generates and bakes once `PlanetaryData` is present; publishes `StarCubemapHandle` and `SkyCatalogue` resources)

SkyMaterial / sky_dome.wgsl — bindings 4/5 sample the cubemap, binding 2 holds row-major body→celestial rotation R_y(-rotation_angle), binding 3 carries night brightness + airmass extinction strength. Composited additively on top of Rayleigh atmosphere; airmass extinction `exp(-k·(1/cos z - 1))` near the horizon
features.notes: Deterministic from the system seed XOR'd with SKY_SEED_SALT. Each celestial object stores enough physical state (mass, T_eff, distance, redshift, surface brightness, ...) for future EM-band re-bakes and long-exposure modes (filed as SKY-006). 1024² × 6 RGBA16F cubemap (24 MB). Stars co-rotate with the sun via the same `OrbitalState.rotation_angle` already used by `compute_sun_direction_world`. 37 sky-module tests.

features.name: RENDER-010 LOD seam infrastructure (Phase 0)
implements: ChunkDir enum with opposite() + ALL constant — cubed_sphere.rs (after CubeFace impl)
same_face_neighbor_at_lod(dir, target_lod, mean_radius) -> Option<CubeSphereCoord> — integer-arithmetic cross-LOD lookup using ceil-based face_chunks_per_edge_lod; div_euclid for NegU/NegV edge cases
same_face_neighbors_at_lod_all(dir, target_lod, mean_radius) -> Vec<CubeSphereCoord> — returns all target-LOD chunks whose footprint overlaps the given boundary
BoundaryLoop { face: ChunkDir, vertices: Vec<DVec3>, indices: Vec<u32> } + ChunkBoundaryLoops Component — boundary_loop.rs (Phase 0 types only, not yet populated)
Cross-LOD Stage 1b invalidation in v2_collect_terrain — chunk_manager.rs: when a chunk is cached/unloaded, all LOD-adjacent same-face neighbours are despawned
features.notes: Phase 0 of 5-phase RENDER-010 plan. Lays infrastructure only — no visible meshing change. Existing test count unchanged (1624 passing). Phase 1: boundary loop extraction from surface-nets output. Phase 2: stitch mesh generation for same-face LOD seams. Phases 3-5: cross-face, corners, polish. Known pre-existing issue: RENDER-010-RACE (stale in-flight mesh task after cross-LOD invalidation).
features.description: Explicit LOD transition meshes (stitch mesh) for cubed-sphere terrain seams. All 5 phases complete: boundary loop extraction, same-face stitch, cross-face stitch, corner stitches. Invalidation race bug (RENDER-010-RACE) resolved: V2PendingMeshes::stale HashSet discards in-flight mesh results that were invalidated, forcing re-dispatch with accurate neighbour data.

features.name: RENDER-010 Phase 1: Boundary Loop Extraction
features.description: extract_boundary_loops() in src/world/v2/boundary_loop.rs populates ChunkBoundaryLoops component after every surface-nets mesh task. Open-edge detection + FACE_EPS=0.55 vertex classification + walk_chains + world-space transform. Attached to all chunk entities (both AllAir and meshed). 7 unit tests.

features.name: RENDER-010 Phase 2: Stitch Mesh Generation (same-face)
features.description: v2_stitch_update system in src/world/v2/stitch_mesh.rs generates bridging geometry between fine (LOD-N) and coarse (LOD-N+1) boundary loops on the same cube face. V2StitchMap resource tracks active StitchSeam entities. clip_loop_to_range() partitions coarse loops so adjacent fine chunks do not double-stitch. stitch_triangulate() emits triangle fans (2 fine verts + 1 coarse per fan step). Runtime confirmed: 842 active stitches at planet-level 7, 700-frame settle. Same-face only; cross-face is Phase 3.

features.name: RENDER-010 Phase 3: Cross-Face LOD Stitch Lookup
features.description: Added CubeSphereCoord::cross_face_neighbor_at_lod() which maps a fine chunk's boundary direction across a cube-face edge to the representative coarse chunk on the adjacent face. Uses the existing cross_face_u/cross_face_v private tables for face-adjacency mapping + integer midpoint formula for LOD rescaling. Wired into v2_stitch_update as a fallback when same_face_neighbor_at_lod returns None. PosLayer/NegLayer return None (no cross-face radial). 6 new unit tests (+1643 total). Stitch mesh generation itself is unchanged — both same-face and cross-face stitches use the same triangle-fan path.

features.name: RENDER-010 Invalidation Race Fix
features.description: V2PendingMeshes now has a stale: HashSet<CubeSphereCoord>. Chunks marked stale during invalidation have their in-flight task results discarded in v2_collect_meshes, preventing stale fallback-slice meshes from persisting. Same-LOD spurious stitch pass removed (caused floating gray shapes). Commit: 6ad8e2b.

features.title: LOD+1 pairwise stitch radial proximity filter
features.description: Radial proximity filter added to v2_stitch_update pairwise loop. Rejects (fine_chain, coarse_chain) pairs whose mean planet-radii differ by more than CHUNK_SIZE × 2^coarse_lod metres. Eliminates spurious stitches between unrelated terrain hills at different elevations.

conventions.naming: RFC 430: snake_case functions/variables, PascalCase types. Named MaterialId constants (never numeric literals). Kebab-case for .ron file names
conventions.file_structure: One Bevy plugin per module directory with mod.rs. Data structs derive serde::Deserialize + bevy::asset::Asset + TypePath. All .ron data files in assets/data/ with descriptive suffixes (.material.ron, .reaction.ron, .biome.ron, etc.)
other: Lines under 100 characters; rustfmt enforced; clippy warnings treated as errors (-D warnings)
No unwrap()/expect() in library code — use Result with ? operator
Prefer &T over cloning; use &str for function parameters; iterators over index-based loops
All physics use real-world SI units — no arbitrary constants or magic numbers
Eagerly implement Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq, Hash, From, AsRef on types
/// rustdoc comments for all public APIs with examples
Unit tests in #[cfg(test)] mod tests alongside code
Pre-commit hook: cargo fmt --check → cargo clippy -D warnings → cargo test --lib
Bevy 0.18: NO bundles (deprecated), spawn components as tuples, set_if_neq() for state transitions

meta.verification_method: Each 'complete' feature verified by locating specific implementing function(s) with file paths and line numbers. Plugin::build() methods confirmed to register actual systems (not stubs). WGSL shader files confirmed present.
uncertain_areas: Line numbers are approximate — may drift with future edits
WGSL shader internals not audited (only confirmed files exist and are referenced by Rust dispatch code)
VoxelGrid/PerceptionGrid adapter for LOS-based perception not yet implemented (distance-only)

Group rally is wired (src/social/group_systems.rs) and opt-in via SocialGroupMember component, but no creature spawn-side code adds the component yet — the path is dormant until a creature template marks species as social. The other three group planners (cooperative hunt, territory defense, food sharing) remain unwired.
Full atmospheric circulation (Hadley cells, ocean currents, seasonal variation) not yet modelled — basic latitude/altitude/proximity model only
notes: Planetary generation milestone complete: all 7 phases (grid, tectonics, impacts, celestial, biomes/geology, globe renderer, map projections) implemented and committed.
GPU-accelerated terrain projection renderer added (35x speedup at 4096px).
Stefan-Boltzmann energy balance formula fixed in biomes.rs (replaces prior approximation).
Comprehensive README.md with 6 showcase images committed.
Tectonic simulation upgraded: power-law plate sizes, geological time calibration (SI velocities), acceleration model, time-lapse snapshot capture and playback.
Worldgen binary: added --tectonic-mode (quick/normal/extended) and --tectonic-age <Gyr> CLI flags.
Terrain Detail & World Generation milestone complete: all 7 phases (noise engine, presets/CLI, geology, continents, biome-terrain, hydraulic erosion, world creation UI) implemented.
28 MaterialId constants (0-27): 20 original + 8 geological (sandstone, limestone, granite, basalt, coal, copper_ore, gold_ore, quartz_crystal).
8 scene presets: valley_river, spherical_planet, alpine, archipelago, desert_canyon, rolling_plains, volcanic, tundra_fjords.
Extended CLI: --seed, --terrain-detail, --height-scale, --caves, --erosion, --hydraulic-erosion flags.
World creation UI screen with preset selector, auto-bypassed by CLI --scene flag.
Atmospheric sky rendering connected to in-game camera via Bevy 0.18 Atmosphere component. Distance fog with time-of-day color. AmbientLight reduced since atmosphere provides IBL.
In-game map system: local discovery map + global planet map. M key toggle. Discovery persisted in saves (SAVE_VERSION bumped to 4).
issues.json added: structured issue tracker for AI agents. Check at session start, update status as you work, add new issues you discover.
LOD mesh vertex scaling fix: generate_mesh_generic now takes a scale parameter so LOD meshes span full CHUNK_SIZE instead of effective_size.

Chunk performance overhaul: shell hysteresis (snap to chunk center), shell cap at load radius, pending cap (64), collection rate balanced (32/frame), GPU noise enabled for spherical planet, cave depth capped at 200m.

V1 terrain pipeline (flat heightmap, ChunkManagerPlugin, MeshingPlugin, RefinementPlugin, PipelineVersion enum, --pipeline CLI flag) fully removed. V2 cubed-sphere is the sole pipeline. SharedTerrainGen/TerrainGeneratorRes kept as shared resources. ChunkMap stays empty in V2 (V2 uses V2ChunkMap). MeshTask struct kept as marker for diagnostics query. generate_chunk_mesh/lod_step/ChunkMeshResult kept for meshing tests (annotated #[allow(dead_code)]).

Tectonic performance: ScratchBuffers struct pre-allocates all per-step temporaries (advection snapshots, BFS arrays, erosion/strain/deformation swap buffers) outside the step loop. Eliminates ~10 full-grid Vec clones per step (~30% allocation reduction at L7).

Floating-origin system: WorldPosition(DVec3) + RenderOrigin(DVec3) for f64 precision at Earth-scale distances. Rebase at 512m threshold. Two-stage async pipeline: V2TerrainTask → V2VoxelCache → V2MeshTask.
Multi-LOD system: 5 LOD levels with configurable ring distances (~10km total view). LOD-aware cubed-sphere coords with world_transform_scaled().
Spatial sun lighting: compute_sun_direction_world() derives per-position sun direction from orbital state + planet config. SunWorldDirection resource.

GPU voxel generation: 3-pass WGSL compute shader (surface_pass → classify_pass → voxel_pass). Single batch per frame with in-flight guard to prevent concurrent buffer access. CPU fallback when GPU batch is still running.
Flight mode altitude HUD: F3 overlay shows height above terrain surface in meters/km when gravity is off (G key).

SKY-004 resolved: full procedural celestial catalogue (src/sky/) with stars, procedural host-galaxy diffuse band, nebulae (emission/reflection/dark/planetary) and remote galaxies, baked into 1024² × 6 RGBA16F cubemap and additively composited with airmass extinction by the existing GPU sky-dome shader. Stars track planet rotation via body→celestial rotation matrix.

RENDER-010 Phase 5 complete: all six phases of explicit LOD-transition stitch mesh system implemented (Phases 0-4 + post-plan fixes). Stitch meshes bridge fine/coarse boundary loops at LOD seams using pairwise ribbons + corner-cap quads.

RENDER-010 visual quality fixes (b9b79e2 / 018a1ca): stitch meshes now propagate per-vertex normals and colors from source ChunkMesh (previously all-white flat-shaded). T-junction axis consistency fixed: coarse chain axis used in both pairwise and corner stitches. BoundaryLoop struct extended with normals: Vec<[f32;3]> and colors: Vec<[f32;4]>. New helpers: clip_chain_with_attributes, clip_coarse_to_fine_extent_with_attrs, nearest_chain_endpoint_idx.

GPU parity Task 16 Iter 1: Fixed cave tube 3D/2D perlin mismatch in voxel_gen.wgsl. GPU is_cave_gpu now correctly calls perlin2d() for tube noise (was calling perlin3d with zeroed third coord). Small planet parity test passes (645→4 mismatches at dl=-3). Earth-scale parity still fails (504 mismatches, f32 coordinate scaling precision issue, see GPUPARITY-002). New issues: GPUPARITY-001 (resolved), GPUPARITY-002 (open, f32 earth-scale), GPUPARITY-003 (open, strata n≈0 residual).

GPU planetary-noise parity verified at small-planet (32 km). Spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-30-gpu-planetary-noise-parity-design.md. Earth-scale parity deferred under issue GPUPARITY-002 (f32 coord-precision divergence in noise inputs).

Gameplay stress / fuzzy test suite added (tests/stress.rs + tests/cases/stress/). Targets historic teleport-related f32 overflow class (CRASH-001). 9 hand-written RON scenarios + 3 proptest generators. Pre-commit hook supports STRESS_PRECOMMIT=1 (3-RON fast subset, ~2 min) and FULL_TESTS=1 (full suite). Already caught CHUNK-002 and STRESS-001.

CHUNK-002 resolved: chunk_manager.rs desired-chunks sort key promoted to i64 with saturating arithmetic to handle extreme altitudes (>1500 km on SmallPlanet, multi-thousand km on Earth). high_altitude.stress.ron now active and passing. Also fixed a pre-existing build break in src/test_support/stress.rs (QueryState lifetime) introduced by commit 3c7606d that blocked --features test-support builds.
INPUT-001 resolved: extracted shared diagnostics::spawn_screenshot helper; planet/render.rs and DiagnosticsPlugin both call it. Docs F-key table extended to the full F3/F5/F6/F7/F8/F9/F11/F12 set.

Verified MovementIntent → PhysicsBody.velocity wiring is live (execute_action_system in src/behavior/mod.rs lines 408-417); locked in with regression tests wander_action_drives_physics_body_velocity and idle_action_zeroes_horizontal_velocity. The earlier uncertain_area note claiming MovementIntent was not integrated was stale and has been removed.

Phase 2 step 2 (partial): wired plan_rally into ECS via plan_group_rally_system in src/social/group_systems.rs. Creatures with the new opt-in SocialGroupMember component are bucketed by faction; scattered groups (>12m avg from medoid) get Action::RegroupAt overrides written to CurrentAction. Urgent actions (Flee/Attack/Sleep/Eat) and low health/energy are exempted. Action::RegroupAt variant added to behavior::utility::Action; behaviors::execute_regroup is its executor. perceive_and_select_action and compute_paths are now pub(crate) so SocialPlugin can order against them; the new system runs in BehaviorSet between them. Cooperative hunt / territory defense / food sharing planners remain unwired.

Force-driven motion: slab-pull torque computed from oceanic convergent boundary cells (SLAB_PULL_COEFFICIENT=2e-14 rad/yr²), normalized by plate size as inverse moment of inertia. TectonicHistory captures ≤100 snapshots (~2.5 MB/frame at level 7) for time-lapse visualization.

phases.notes: 7 unit tests. Colour modes: elevation, biome, plates, geological age, crust depth, tidal amplitude, rock, temperature. CLI: --globe flag. Globe mesh now has noise displacement + geometry-derived normals via detail.rs. Time-lapse playback: --timelapse captures snapshots (≤70 frames, ~2.5 MB/frame at level 7) with interactive controls (Space: play/pause, arrows: step, >/<: speed).

phases.name: Map projection export

phases.notes: 10 unit tests. CPU rasterization, no GPU needed. Equirect 512px in ~80ms at level 4. Projections now use terrain detail layer for sub-cell noise + hillshading.

phases.name: Terrain detail layer

phases.notes: 10 unit tests. Adds sub-cell noise variation + smooth interpolation between cells + hillshading for relief. Used by both projections.rs (2D maps) and render.rs (3D globe mesh displacement + geometry-derived normals).

phases.name: GPU-accelerated terrain projection
implements: GpuProjectionRenderer — uploads cell data, spatial index, neighbor adjacency to GPU storage buffers

render_projection_gpu() — convenience wrapper matching CPU API, dispatches two 16×16 compute passes
render_animation_gpu() — GPU-accelerated rotating orthographic animation
phases.notes: Hash-based Perlin noise (no permutation table) produces visually similar but not bit-identical output to CPU path. 35× speedup at 4096px. CLI: --gpu flag.

phases.name: Planetary terrain connection

--planet-level (default 5) and --planet-seed (default 42) CLI args

phases.notes: BiomeType→MaterialId and RockType→MaterialId mappings in planetary_sampler.rs. Ore vein placement from ore_bitmask at 3% sparsity. Cave carving reuses SphericalTerrainGenerator noise. Thread-safe via Arc<> cloning into AsyncComputeTaskPool. RON asset loading now active: planet_config.ron is loaded via AssetServer and applied to overwrite default PlanetConfig.

phases.notes: 24 unit tests. Replaces 2-layer Perlin blend. Opt-in via Option<NoiseConfig> on PlanetConfig.
